title: tecoma chrysea
intro: Tecoma chrysea, also known as Yellow Bells, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the trumpet vine family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Tecoma chrysea include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, lower blood pressure, and reduce symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of Tecoma chrysea can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
